item.title: Historical NEGATIONISM!
item.description: Historical negationism, also called historical denialism, is falsification or distortion of the historical record. Let every voter of color who voted for the felonious fascist or who didn't vote because of lack of enthusiasm, chew on this and have a look down the road to where the fascist oligarchs intend to take them. Likewise, let every woman, Asian, Latin, Jew who didn't vote to keep the lying, grifting, cheating thug's hands off the levers of power now realize how they've been manipulated by Big Media, especially Fox and Sinclair, and hope that there is yet enough rope left . . . . .!
item.dc:creator: DocRock61

item.title: They ran out of pancake batter.
item.description: My son has a bottomless stomach, and pancakes are his favorite food. He only signed up for the contest at the last minute because some kid was bragging that he was going to annihilate everyone, and my son wanted to prove him wrong. He ate fourteen pancakes.
item.dc:creator: Zinfandella

item.title: I can feel you all around me - Thickening the air I'm breathing - Holding on to what I'm feeling - Savoring this heart that's healing
item.description: SOURCE: https://www.instagram.com/annamarinovaart/?hl=en FLYLEAF: All Around Me
item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

item.title: So I posted this yesterday and it got removed from imgur. Wtf imgur?
item.description:
How is this in any form bad or offensive?
I also uploaded this and said, "This is how I have it on my phone lol" People need to be aware of this. Especially with how things are going. Every time this post gets Removed, I'm re-upload it. (Reason for the picture is because I think people should do the right thing for the right cause without fear) To the imgur users, Please give this attention and feel free to down vote my previous post
item.dc:creator: CaptainCaptObvious

item.title: Aye you know what it is Wolf Dump
item.description:
We here at Wolf and Pals have a strict laugh policy when people mess with animals because fuck em that's why.
Fuck em
Fuck em

item.dc:creator: IndustrialSparks

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1254 (ancient and immense)
item.description:
? ?Let's get this bread, i guess? ?
The Alt National park Service account has confirmed that there is a gag order on all federal agencies. I guess the Glorious Leader remembered how the forest service was the first to fight back last time Humbaba was in charge.
Oh, where is our Gilgamesh? Where is our Enkidu? To liberate the land from this ravenous monster!
This guy is probably my favorite esoteric geology meme maker.
If there is a heaven and hell, and I pray there is, all these fuckers are gonna be surprised on judgement day. Which doesn't help any of us now.
Be the sand in the gears. Be the weeds in the sidewalk. Be like Alianthus, whose roots tear the foundations of fascism apart.
You know what? @sisipherr is gonna probably smack me saying this, but we all need to be the goutweed in the gardens of government. Annoying as fuck for the ruling powers. Near Impossible to remove. Somewhat tasty when used in a pesto sauce. Wait, where was I?
At this point I'd honestly take the Kaiju.
You know, Doctorpenisboob makes a good point. Incidentally, I decided that I will no longer be saving Twitter memes into my stash. Once I share what I have already gathered, I will gain no more. I know it ain't much, but it is honest work (I hope)
Again, if you are trying to flee to California or Mexico and are passing through Arizona, I will provide you a safe harbor on the way. I will treat you to dinner and send you with mead to take on your journey. Your journey will be a safe secret from me. Also, you can meet The Pippin in person.
I know it's hard. I bless you with spite to keep going. Take your meds and drink a full glass of water. If you can, take a shower.
The Fascinatus was a penis that was used to drive away evil spirits and ill luck. And yes, this is where we get "fascinating" as a word from. Thanks, Rome.
Craaaab.
I really do love Georgian wine.
Dundundun.
Goodbye, national parks (probably)
I'd watch it.
I will happily raise someone else's child and be a stepdad, but as for me and my genes, this is the end of the line.
For the bread? Sure. Give.
Yesterday, Pippin took a nap between my beard and the hood of my wizard robes, snuggled cozily, and it was wild to think about how I've got a dinosaur who trusts me enough to sleep on me.
This kid? Was me as a kid. I'm sorry to everyone that knew me.
The only months worse for me than January are December and February. Maybe I just don't do well with this winter thing.
Lol these people amuse me.
Let us aid one another. Let us be the mycelium network that creates a forest and destroys the men with axes.
Love watching Spotted Towhees for just this reason, also their little towhee shuffle as they scratch on the forest floor.
Honestly, the Triassic does not get the love it deserves.
This looks like a nice spot to hang out in spring.
I recommend Discworld. Sir Terry was a good human. I miss him, so much.
In my next life, if there is such a thing, I want to be a tree of some kind. Or a swift.
Which is why I just... am feral.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "What are you doing? I love you. Glory Pippin."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Elon Musk is a Nazi
item.description: Sometimes a Nazi salute is just a Nazi salute. Let's make this image the first thing that comes up in a Google image search for this a$$hat.

We very recently decided eggs can fuck right off until further notice.
Berries can get fucked too
